message.content:
1) No — there is no filmstrip graphic with sprocket holes; it is a normal video thumbnail (YouTube video preview).  
2) No — there is no horizontal time ruler with tick marks and time labels.  
3) No — there are no visible draggable in/out trim handles on a timeline.  
4) No — there is no waveform (audio amplitude visualization).  
5) OPAQUE — surfaces/cards have solid backgrounds (no translucency/blur).  
6) Warm-tinted dark (dark brown/black background).  
7) Yes — visible hairline rules (1px horizontal divider lines, e.g., between “Video MP4”/“Audio MP3” and resolution options).  
8) Sans-serif (all text uses sans-serif fonts, no serifs).  
9) No — no monospace text (fixed-width font).  
10) Exact text labels (top to bottom):  
- “Source acquired”  
- “Lo-fi Hip Hop Radio · Beats to Relax/Study to”  
- “01”  
- “THE VAULT”  
- “JUN 30”  
- “Keep the frame, drop the noise.”  
- “A considered downloader for YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok. Pick the moment, choose the format, archive it.”  
- “FIG. 01 – INPUT”  
- “SOURCE”  
- “/ https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9”  
- “YOUTUBE DETECTED”
